items.title: Calling a chat completions endpoint
items.scenario: You POST a prompt and messages to an LLM REST API with your key.
items.explanation: Set Authorization: Bearer <key> and a JSON body, then check res.ok before reading the reply.

items.title: Catching a rate limit
items.scenario: The API returns 429 Too Many Requests under load.
items.explanation: Because fetch doesn't reject on 429, you inspect res.status and back off / retry.

items.title: Bounding a slow call
items.scenario: A request occasionally hangs and you don't want to wait forever.
items.explanation: An AbortController aborts the fetch after a timeout, turning the hang into a catchable error.

items.title: Streaming tokens to the UI
items.scenario: You want to show the model's answer as it's generated.
items.explanation: Read response.body as a stream and append chunks, instead of awaiting the full .json().
